message: robot move failed - human intervention required

error_hint.meaning: MG400 rejected an edge or unreachable travel target
error_hint.likely_cause: The selected coin is close to the calibrated/workspace boundary, or the robot cannot safely plan the high-Z transfer to that XY.
error_hint.suggested_action: Clear the alarm, skip this edge target, choose a central coin, and keep targets inside the conservative workspace.
